# Code Review Plugin

Code review and quality — adversarial review, security patterns.

## What's Included

### Agents

- **PF Assist** (`pf-assist`) — PatternFly development routing — maps code changes, test gaps, scaffolding needs, and design work to the right PF sub-skills.
